# Samferdselsdepartementet

*31 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Lovdata | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|---------|-----------|
| [Lov om Overenskomst om internasjonal jernbanetrafikk (COTIF-loven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-12-10-82.md) | COTIF-loven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2004-12-10-82) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2004-12-10-82.md) · [v2004](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2004/lover/lov-2004-12-10-82.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2004-12-10-82.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2004-12-10-82.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2004-12-10-82.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2004-12-10-82.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2004-12-10-82.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2004-12-10-82.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2004-12-10-82.md) |
| [Lov om anlegg og drift av jernbane, herunder sporvei, tunnelbane og forstadsbane](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1993-06-11-100.md) | Jernbaneloven – jbl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1993-06-11-100) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1993-06-11-100.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1993-06-11-100.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1993-06-11-100.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1993-06-11-100.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1993-06-11-100.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1993-06-11-100.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1993-06-11-100.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1993-06-11-100.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1993-06-11-100.md) |
| [Lov om endringar i lov om Overenskomst om internasjonal jernbanetrafikk (COTIF-l](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2023-06-20-81.md) | Endringslov til COTIF-lova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2023-06-20-81) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2023-06-20-81.md) · [v2023](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2023/lover/lov-2023-06-20-81.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2023-06-20-81.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2023-06-20-81.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2023-06-20-81.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i lov 4. juli 2003 nr. 83 om elektronisk kommunikasjon (ekomlov](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2008-01-11-2.md) | Endringslov til ekomloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2008-01-11-2) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2008-01-11-2.md) · [v2008](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2008/lover/lov-2008-01-11-2.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2008-01-11-2.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2008-01-11-2.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2008-01-11-2.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2008-01-11-2.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2008-01-11-2.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2008-01-11-2.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i veglova mv. (overføring av fylkesveiadministrasjon)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-06-21-68.md) | Endringslov til veglova mv. (overføring av fylkesveiadministrasjon) | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2019-06-21-68) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2019-06-21-68.md) · [v2019](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2019/lover/lov-2019-06-21-68.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2019-06-21-68.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2019-06-21-68.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2019-06-21-68.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2019-06-21-68.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i vegtrafikkloven (opplæring)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-04-03-18.md) | Endringslov til vegtrafikkloven (opplæring) | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2020-04-03-18) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-04-03-18.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2020-04-03-18.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2020-04-03-18.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2020-04-03-18.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2020-04-03-18.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i yrkestransportloven mv. (drosjetilbud, internkontroll, kontro](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-111.md) | Endringslov til yrkestransportloven mv. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-111) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-111.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-111.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-111.md) |
| [Lov om fornøyelsesinnretninger (tivoliloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-05-22-30.md) | Tivoliloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-05-22-30) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-05-22-30.md) · [v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2017/lover/lov-2017-05-22-30.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2017-05-22-30.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-05-22-30.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-05-22-30.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-05-22-30.md) |
| [Lov om gjennomføring av fellesregler om innenlands transport i EØS-avtalen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1995-05-26-25.md) | Lov om innenlands transport i EØS-avtalen | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1995-05-26-25) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1995-05-26-25.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1995-05-26-25.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1995-05-26-25.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1995-05-26-25.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1995-05-26-25.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1995-05-26-25.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1995-05-26-25.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1995-05-26-25.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1995-05-26-25.md) |
| [Lov om infrastruktur for alternativt drivstoff](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-06-19-95.md) | Lov om infrastruktur for alternativt drivstoff | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2020-06-19-95) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-06-19-95.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2020-06-19-95.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2020-06-19-95.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2020-06-19-95.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2020-06-19-95.md) |
| [Lov om intelligente transportsystemer innenfor vegtransport m.m. (ITS-loven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-12-11-101.md) | ITS-loven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2015-12-11-101) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2015-12-11-101.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2015-12-11-101.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2015-12-11-101.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2015-12-11-101.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2015-12-11-101.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2015-12-11-101.md) |
| [Lov om luftfart (luftfartsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1993-06-11-101.md) | Luftfartsloven – luftl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1993-06-11-101) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1993-06-11-101.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1993-06-11-101.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1993-06-11-101.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1993-06-11-101.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1993-06-11-101.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1993-06-11-101.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1993-06-11-101.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1993-06-11-101.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1993-06-11-101.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Jernbaneverkets forretningsenhet BaneService til aksjeselska](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-01-07-5.md) | Lov om BaneService som AS | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2005-01-07-5) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-01-07-5.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2005-01-07-5.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2005-01-07-5.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2005-01-07-5.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2005-01-07-5.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2005-01-07-5.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2005-01-07-5.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2005-01-07-5.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Jernbaneverkets kommersielle televirksomhet til aksjeselskap](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2001-06-15-87.md) | Lov om BaneTele AS | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2001-06-15-87) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2001-06-15-87.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-2001-06-15-87.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2001-06-15-87.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2001-06-15-87.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2001-06-15-87.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2001-06-15-87.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2001-06-15-87.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2001-06-15-87.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2001-06-15-87.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Kystverkets produksjonsvirksomhet til statsaksjeselskap](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-12-17-90.md) | Lov om Kystverkets produksjonsvirksomhet | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2004-12-17-90) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2004-12-17-90.md) · [v2004](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2004/lover/lov-2004-12-17-90.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2004-12-17-90.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2004-12-17-90.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2004-12-17-90.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2004-12-17-90.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2004-12-17-90.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2004-12-17-90.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2004-12-17-90.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Luftfartsverket til aksjeselskap](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2002-12-13-85.md) | Lov om Statens lufthavnselskap | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2002-12-13-85) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2002-12-13-85.md) · [v2002](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2002/lover/lov-2002-12-13-85.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2002-12-13-85.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2002-12-13-85.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2002-12-13-85.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2002-12-13-85.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2002-12-13-85.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2002-12-13-85.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2002-12-13-85.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Postbanken BA til aksjeselskap](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1999-06-18-42.md) | Lov om omdanning til Postbanken AS – Postbl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1999-06-18-42) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-06-18-42.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1999-06-18-42.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1999-06-18-42.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1999-06-18-42.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1999-06-18-42.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1999-06-18-42.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1999-06-18-42.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1999-06-18-42.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1999-06-18-42.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Statens vegvesens produksjonsvirksomhet til statlig aksjesel](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2002-12-13-84.md) | Lov om statlig aksjeselskap for vegproduksjon | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2002-12-13-84) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2002-12-13-84.md) · [v2002](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2002/lover/lov-2002-12-13-84.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2002-12-13-84.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2002-12-13-84.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2002-12-13-84.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2002-12-13-84.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2002-12-13-84.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2002-12-13-84.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2002-12-13-84.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av statens jernbanetrafikkselskap (NSB BA) og statens postselsk](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2002-06-21-43.md) | Lov om NSB AS og Posten Norge AS | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2002-06-21-43) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2002-06-21-43.md) · [v2002](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2002/lover/lov-2002-06-21-43.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2002-06-21-43.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2002-06-21-43.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2002-06-21-43.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2002-06-21-43.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2002-06-21-43.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2002-06-21-43.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2002-06-21-43.md) |
| [Lov om overføring av ansvar for kollektivtransport](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-64.md) | Lov om overføring av ansvar for kollektivtransport | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-06-16-64) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-16-64.md) · [v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2017/lover/lov-2017-06-16-64.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2017-06-16-64.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-06-16-64.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-06-16-64.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-06-16-64.md) |
| [Lov om overføring av offentlige og private rettsforhold fra Statens vegvesen til](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-12-18-133.md) | Lov om Nye Veier AS | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2015-12-18-133) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2015-12-18-133.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2015-12-18-133.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2015-12-18-133.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2015-12-18-133.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2015-12-18-133.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2015-12-18-133.md) |
| [Lov om overføring av rettigheter og forpliktelser ved omklassifisering av veg et](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-109.md) | Lov om omklassifisering av veg | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2009-06-19-109) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2009-06-19-109.md) · [v2009](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2009/lover/lov-2009-06-19-109.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2009-06-19-109.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2009-06-19-109.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2009-06-19-109.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2009-06-19-109.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2009-06-19-109.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2009-06-19-109.md) |
| [Lov om posttjenester (postloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-09-04-91.md) | Postloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2015-09-04-91) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2015-09-04-91.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2015-09-04-91.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2015-09-04-91.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2015-09-04-91.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2015-09-04-91.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2015-09-04-91.md) |
| [Lov om reservasjonssystemer for flyreiser mv.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2016-09-09-80.md) | Lov om reservasjonssystemer for flyreiser mv. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2016-09-09-80) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2016-09-09-80.md) · [v2016](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2016/lover/lov-2016-09-09-80.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2016-09-09-80.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2016-09-09-80.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2016-09-09-80.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2016-09-09-80.md) |
| [Lov om taubaner (taubaneloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-05-22-29.md) | Taubaneloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-05-22-29) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-05-22-29.md) · [v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2017/lover/lov-2017-05-22-29.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2017-05-22-29.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-05-22-29.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-05-22-29.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-05-22-29.md) |
| [Lov om utleie av små elektriske kjøretøy på offentlig grunn](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2021-06-18-139.md) | Lov om utleie av små elektriske kjøretøy på offentlig grunn | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2021-06-18-139) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2021-06-18-139.md) · [v2021](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2021/lover/lov-2021-06-18-139.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2021-06-18-139.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2021-06-18-139.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2021-06-18-139.md) |
| [Lov om utprøving av selvkjørende kjøretøy](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-12-15-112.md) | Lov om utprøving av selvkjørende kjøretøy | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-12-15-112) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-12-15-112.md) · [v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2017/lover/lov-2017-12-15-112.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2017-12-15-112.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-12-15-112.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-12-15-112.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-12-15-112.md) |
| [Lov om varsling, rapportering og undersøkelse av jernbaneulykker og jernbanehend](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-06-03-34.md) | Jernbaneundersøkelsesloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2005-06-03-34) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-06-03-34.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2005-06-03-34.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2005-06-03-34.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2005-06-03-34.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2005-06-03-34.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2005-06-03-34.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2005-06-03-34.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2005-06-03-34.md) |
| [Lov om vegar (veglova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1963-06-21-23.md) | Veglova – vegl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1963-06-21-23) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1963-06-21-23.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1963-06-21-23.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1963-06-21-23.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1963-06-21-23.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1963-06-21-23.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1963-06-21-23.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1963-06-21-23.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1963-06-21-23.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1963-06-21-23.md) |
| [Lov om vegtrafikk (vegtrafikkloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1965-06-18-4.md) | Vegtrafikkloven – vtrl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1965-06-18-4) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1965-06-18-4.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1965-06-18-4.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1965-06-18-4.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1965-06-18-4.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1965-06-18-4.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1965-06-18-4.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1965-06-18-4.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1965-06-18-4.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1965-06-18-4.md) |
| [Lov om yrkestransport med motorvogn og fartøy (yrkestransportlova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2002-06-21-45.md) | Yrkestransportlova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2002-06-21-45) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2002-06-21-45.md) · [v2002](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2002/lover/lov-2002-06-21-45.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2002-06-21-45.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2002-06-21-45.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2002-06-21-45.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2002-06-21-45.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2002-06-21-45.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2002-06-21-45.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2002-06-21-45.md) |
